allow: Bash(git add .gitignore LICENSE context/AuthContext.js screens/LoginScreen.js services/auth.js services/localModel.js App.js package.json screens/DashboardScreen.js screens/WeeklyScreen.js)

Bash(gh repo create ironcoach --public --source=. --push --description "AI-powered Ironman triathlon training app for iPhone. Uses on-device Qwen 3.5 model for personalized daily workouts based on Apple Health data.")

Bash(gh repo create ecimionatto/daily-train-app --public --source=. --push --description "AI-powered Ironman triathlon training app for iPhone. On-device Qwen 3.5 workout generation with Apple Health integration.")

Bash(git add .mise.toml .npmrc .eslintrc.json .eslintignore .prettierrc.json .prettierignore babel.config.js .husky/pre-commit .claude/launch.json __tests__/healthKit.test.js package.json package-lock.json .gitignore .devcontainer/devcontainer.json App.js components/TabBar.js context/AppContext.js screens/DashboardScreen.js screens/LoginScreen.js screens/OnboardingScreen.js screens/RecoveryScreen.js screens/WeeklyScreen.js screens/WorkoutScreen.js services/auth.js services/claudeAI.js services/localModel.js)
Bash(GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0 git -c credential.helper='!gh auth git-credential' -c credential.helper='' push)

Bash(git add services/chatService.js context/ChatContext.js screens/ChatScreen.js __tests__/chatService.test.js components/TabBar.js App.js context/AuthContext.js .devcontainer/github-accounts.json .devcontainer/devcontainer.json .devcontainer/setup-git.sh)
